name: Dropbox API v2
description: The Dropbox API v2 allows developers to integrate with Dropbox for file storage, sharing, user management, and team administration. All endpoints use POST (except download-style endpoints which also support GET). Parameters are sent as JSON in the request body for RPC-style endpoints, or in the Dropbox-API-Arg header for upload/download-style endpoints.
